findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Ensure the main landmark is at top level
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  The main landmark is contained in another landmark. [<main>]

findings.description: Ensure the document has at most one main landmark
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Document has more than one main landmark [<main>]

Fix any of the following:
  The landmark must have a unique aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title to make landmarks distinguishable [<main>]

findings.description: Repeated page header/footer content in HTML
findings.evidence: The following text blocks repeat 3+ times, likely page headers/footers that should not appear in the body: 'sab – what it is' (3x).

findings.description: The North Carolina state flag image is missing from the title slide in the HTML rendering
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows the NC state flag prominently centered above the title text. The HTML rendering does not display this flag image.

findings.description: The NC state flag image present on PDF page 2 is missing in the HTML rendering
findings.evidence: PDF page 2 shows the NC state flag on the left side. The HTML rendering shows no flag image.

findings.description: Page 2 in the PDF appears to be a transition/divider slide with just the flag, but the HTML renders it as an empty section between the title and the legislation content
findings.evidence: PDF page 2 has just the NC flag as a visual divider. HTML shows this as a blank area with no content.

findings.description: The Modeling Supports Planning diagram with nested ellipses is missing from the HTML
findings.evidence: PDF page 10 shows a nested ellipse diagram with 'Water Supply Planning' as the outer ellipse and 'River Basin Modeling' as the inner ellipse. The HTML replaces this with plain text listing the two items.

findings.description: The DWR (Division of Water Resources) logo is present in the HTML but appears significantly different in size/rendering compared to the PDF
findings.evidence: PDF page 11 shows the DWR logo prominently. The HTML shows a smaller version of the logo.

findings.description: Duplicate heading text for 'SAB – What It Is' used across three separate sections without differentiation
findings.evidence: The PDF has three slides all titled 'SAB – What It Is' (pages 6, 7, 8). The HTML reproduces these as three separate <h2> sections with identical heading text. While this matches the PDF, the heading hierarchy has a minor issue: the 'SAB – What It Is' on page 7 and 8 could benefit from differentiation, but this mirrors the source.

findings.description: The HTML has a duplicate nested <main> element, creating a structural redundancy
findings.evidence: The HTML contains <body><main><main>...</main></main></body> — two nested <main> tags. This is a structural duplication artifact of the conversion.
